text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The coveted Grand Mile. I've accumulated all the
victories necessary to be named the Ruler of the
Mile!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A junior-year G1 mile, the Oka Sho, the NHK
Mile Cup, the Mile Championship, the February
Stakes, the Victoria Mile, and the Yasuda
Kinen—all seven are mine!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm the Ruler of the Mile and the All-Rounder. Has my character derailed?! ...Aaand, that worry has passed as quickly as it came.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This achievement is my chance to talk to many
other Umamusume I only had the most superficial
links to before... This is my link to the whole
world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I am the Ruler of the Mile! I'm gonna keep this up
and dominate all distances!
